landing.subtitle: An edu-game on labor, fair trade & structural empathy
landing.tagline: Free the Sages imprisoned in the Castle of Silence

onboarding.title: Persona Assignment
onboarding.crystal_ball: The crystal ball decides your destiny

Alpha.name: Alpha
Alpha.desc: A sharp analyst who sees the world through numbers and statistics

Delta.name: Delta
Delta.desc: A warm communicator who dissolves conflict with empathy

Omega.name: Omega
Omega.desc: An innovator who turns the impossible into possible

Lambda.name: Lambda
Lambda.desc: A warm supporter who restores the team's energy

Sigma.name: Sigma
Sigma.desc: A sharp-eyed justice advocate who sees through injustice

hud.logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave? Progress may not be saved.

phase0.name: The Veil of Illusion
phase0.desc: The truth hidden behind sweet temptation

phase1.name: Magnifier of Truth
phase1.desc: Discover the hidden traces of exploitation

phase1.title: Phase 1 · Magnifier of Truth
phase1.header: Uncover What's Hidden Behind the Ads
phase1.report_placeholder: Analyze how the truths you discovered are interconnected.
phase1.submit_waiting: Waiting for teacher's golden seal approval...
phase1.min_truths: Discover at least 3 truths to submit your report

phase2.title: Phase 2 · Debate of Wisdom
phase2.persuade_target: Persuade 3+ NPCs to advance to Phase 3
phase2.rounds_exhausted: Rounds with this NPC are over. Talk to another NPC.

phase3.title: Phase 3 · Design of Fairness
phase3.subtitle: Adjust the sliders to create a price structure everyone can accept

phase4.title: Phase 4 · Mirror of Reflection
phase4.subtitle: Record what you learned, felt, and will practice
phase4.pledge_subtitle: Choose one pledge to practice from today
phase4.all_required: Answer all questions (5+ chars each) to submit
phase4.ending_subtitle: The Castle of Silence Has Fallen

briefing.phase0_mission: Look at the ad and decide whether to buy!
briefing.phase0_tip: Trust your instincts. You might be surprised later.
briefing.phase1_mission: Scratch the screen to discover hidden truths!
briefing.phase1_tip: Truths are hidden beneath the bright spots.
briefing.phase2_mission: Talk to 5 NPCs and persuade them!
briefing.phase2_tip: Identifying each NPC's weakness makes persuasion easier.
briefing.phase3_tip: Check if the farmer's income is sufficient.
briefing.phase4_mission: Write a reflection journal about your journey!
briefing.phase4_tip: Be honest. There are no wrong answers.

error.title: An error occurred
error.desc: A temporary problem occurred. Please try again.

results.title: Session Results
results.well_done: Well done! The Castle of Silence has regained its light.
